bupt.ta.service

类 AdminService.UserListRow

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.AdminService.UserListRow
  • 封闭类:
    AdminService

    public static class AdminService.UserListRow
extends java.lang.Object
    One row in the admin user directory.
